title: Fix critical production bugs: schema normalization, anemia suppression, clinical type gating
description: Phase 1 of production bug fixes. Fix K: Add normalizeAiResult() adapter in Code.gs to bridge flat Gemini schema to nested internal schema (fixes Unknown Patient, missing DOB, Unknown Sender). Fix C: Change assessAnemia() null case from severity:'unknown' to 'none' and harden display predicate. Fix D: Add CLINICAL_FAX_TYPES whitelist in Config.gs, gate computeClinicalIntelligence() call in Gemini.gs. Council-reviewed plan with 6 LLMs.

title: Implement command parser for Google Chat
description: Create commands.ts to parse user messages and identify commands (/add, /queue, /status, /cancel, /help). Extract YouTube URLs from text when user @mentions the bot without explicit command. Support slash commands and @mentions. Return structured command objects with action, url (if present), and parameters. Must handle edge cases: @mention without URL, malformed URLs, unknown commands. Write comprehensive tests.
